steps.title: Use parallel angle facts
steps.content: Because lines $l$ and $k$ are parallel, the angle corresponding to the given $64^\circ$ angle also measures $64^\circ$. That gives the angle adjacent to $a$ at the upper intersection.

steps.title: Use the linear pair
steps.content: Angle $a$ forms a linear pair with that $64^\circ$ angle, so the two angles are supplementary and their measures add to $180^\circ$. $$a+64=180$$ $$a=116$$ The answer is C.
